title: Dusk RPG
description: A classic kitchen sink RPG modpack with custom items and features.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fa4a1daf656a9eb6d10fad073d1d425a3a44492_0.webp)
A bold minecraft RPG experience
![Content Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66a50a14cffe058b118999ec98058601ce3ab40a_0.webp) ## ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ Features - 🌍 Custom Structures and Biomes - Terralith by Stardust Labs - ⚔️ Dungeons - Dungeons & Taverns by NovaWostra - 🏆 Achivements - Player Stats Progression by Aolu - 💪 Armor - Armory by ZsoltMolnarrr - ☀️ Shaders - Iris Shaders - 💡 Improved HUD - Jade by Snownee, EMI by Emi - 📿 Accessories - Trinkets by Emi - 🥈 Skills - LevelZ by Globox1997 - 💻 Performance - Sodium by CaffineMC, FerriteCore by malte0811 ![Content Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66a50a14cffe058b118999ec98058601ce3ab40a_0.webp) ## ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ FAQ > **Q: How can I submit a bug report/compatibility issue?** **A:** By creating a Issue on [Our GitHub](https://github.com/N0tHorizon/Dusk-RPG/issues) > **Q: How offten does Dusk get updated?** **A:** We try to update for every new minecraft version, but if their are too many mod conflicts we will skip the version. ![Content Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66a50a14cffe058b118999ec98058601ce3ab40a_0.webp)
